function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "claudia@helios-tax.example"
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Attached is the 2025-12-18 invoice for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written once and should not be rewritten. Verification: attachment path was previously read, single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches Claudia's canonical primary_contact_email, body does not quote source text, and the subject value with colon-space is correctly quoted. Next complete the workflow by deleting the processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email draft at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md for Claudia with the exact 2025-12-18 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Completed the inbox workflow: verified sender against canonical entity, verified exact requested invoice in finance records, created one outbound draft in the correct email lane, and deleted the processed inbox file after completion.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested invoice resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note by preparing an outbound email draft to Claudia Reiter at her verified address with the exact requested 2025-12-18 Helios invoice attached, then removed the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS when entering folders, inspected 99_system before task work, treated inbox email header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used finance and outbox lane rules, wrote exactly one outbox record, then deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_OK is supported by canonical evidence: the inbox email at /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md came from claudia@helios-tax.example; /10_entities/cast/claudia.md lists that same address as Claudia Reiter's primary_contact_email; /50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md is the exact Helios invoice issued on 2025-12-18 that she requested. The resend was prepared in the correct Helios client email lane per /99_system/workflows/sending-email.md and /60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md.
